calendar.matters:
MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael D. Weil, Esq., MORGAN, LEWIS & BOCKIUS LLP +1.415.442.1000 michael.weil@morganlewis.com Attorney for Petitioners TESLA MOTORS, INC. and ELON MUSK
William Moran II, Esq., ARTHUR WILLIAM, LLP (520) 604-0260 Bill@awlegalfirm.com
Attorneys for Respondent CRISTINA BALAN

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERS TESLA MOTORS, INC., AND ELON MUSK's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

Petitioners Tesla Motor, Inc. and Elon Musk's petition to confirm arbitration award is granted. (See word minutes for complete ruling) Court agrees to add language that the Prejudging issue was a close call.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

2 - PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD. Per the Court.
Off Calendar Oct-13-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Michael D. Weil, Esq., MORGAN, LEWIS & BOCKIUS LLP +1.415.442.1000 michael.weil@morganlewis.com Attorney for Petitioners TESLA MOTORS, INC. and ELON MUSK
William Moran II, Esq., ARTHUR WILLIAM, LLP (520) 604-0260 Bill@awlegalfirm.com
Attorneys for Respondent CRISTINA BALAN

Hearing is held. ARGUED. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD.

Respondent Cristina Balan's petition to vacate arbitration award is denied. (See word minutes for complete ruling) Court agrees to add language that the Prejudging issue was a close call.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Visiting Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (301/HEK)

2 - PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD.
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Continued To Oct-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Michael D. Weil, Esq. 415-442-1000 Morgan Lewis & Bockius LLP for Plaintiff.
William Moran II, Esq. 520-604-0260 bill@awlegalfirm.com for Defendant. (In-person)

ARGUED. Mr. Moran presents arguments on delayed disclosure, disclosure violations of arbitrator and bias.
9:48am The Court takes a brief recess for Counsel to tab papers.
9:58am Back in Session. Mr. Weil responds.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

2 - PETITION TO VACATE ARBITRATION AWARD.

Continued to 10/13/25 at 9am to be heard in Dept. 301 before the Hon. Judge Kahn. Mr. Moran's (Ms. Balan) supplemental briefing due by 9/12/25. Mr. Weil's (Tesla) response to supplemental papers by 10/3/25. The only issue is the corruption issue focusing on whether the arbitrator acted improperly by reaching a decision on choice of law prior to briefing and hearing.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Aug-19-2025 Continued To Oct-13-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (by Zoom):
Michael D. Weil, Esq. 415-442-1000 Morgan Lewis & Bockius LLP for Plaintiff.
William Moran II, Esq. 520-604-0260 bill@awlegalfirm.com for Defendant. (In-person)

ARGUED. Mr. Moran presents arguments on delayed disclosure, disclosure violations of arbitrator and bias.
9:48am The Court takes a brief recess for Counsel to tab papers.
9:58am Back in Session. Mr. Weil responds.
The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

1 - Petitioners Tesla Motors, Inc. and Elon Musk's petition to confirm arbitration award.

Continued to 10/13/25 at 9am to be heard in Dept. 301 before the Hon. Judge Kahn. Mr. Moran's (Ms. Balan) supplemental briefing due by 9/12/25. Mr. Weil's (Tesla) response to supplemental papers by 10/3/25. The only issue is the corruption issue focusing on whether the arbitrator acted improperly by reaching a decision on choice of law prior to briefing and hearing.

Judge: Harold E. Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/HEK)

MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
Off Calendar Jul-23-2025 Continued To Aug-19-25 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: Prior to the hearing parties stipulated to the continuance date of 8/19/25.

No appearances in Open Court. The Court modifies the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONERs TESLA MOTORS, INC.,and ELON MUSK's MOTION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD.

Continued to August 19, 2025, per stipulation of the parties and approval of the court.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
